'''sachïfthïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackajack|crackajack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackajack|crackajack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| sachïfthïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sæchïfthïfth || sæchïfthïfj || sæchïfthïfsh || sæchïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sachïfchïfthïfth || sachïfchïfthïfj || sachïfchïfthïfsh || sachïfchïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sachïfthïfth || sachïfthïfj || sachïfthïfsh || sachïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sachïffthïffth || sachïffthïffj || sachïffthïffsh || sachïffthïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sachïfthïfïf || sachïfthïfïf || sachïfthïfïf || sachïfthïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || sachïfthïfth || sachïfthïfj || sachïfthïfsh || sachïfthïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sachïfthïfïfl || sachïfthïfïfl || sachïfthïfïfl || sachïfthïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sachïfthïfïfïf || sachïfthïfïfïf || sachïfthïfïfïf || sachïfthïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || sachïfthïfïfn || sachïfthïfïfn || sachïfthïfïfn || sachïfthïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sachïfthïfïforo || sachïfthïfïforo || sachïfthïfïforo || sachïfthïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
